_note: B9 production spec: assigns the two charter members of the new 11th family (Spirit = raw family byte 10 / $0A) via same-size family-byte edits at $03:$4461 (offset $00 of each 43-byte monster-info entry). 'from' is validated against the vanilla ROM at build time. Consumed by BOTH tools/build_family_reassign.py --spec (-> patches/bank_003.asm) AND tools/build_library_table.py --reassign (-> patches/bank_012.asm), so the family bytes and the library grouping stay in lock-step (the 'one spec, two consistent artifacts' rule). Dracky (78) moves out of Bird(3); Darkdrium (214) moves out of Boss/???(9).
